name: Manual Shopify Integration Steps
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can complete the manual Shopify integration by adding product tagging, creating a search results page, and inserting the Merchandising Cloud script in your theme files, which enables product tracking, cart analytics, and search functionality. This technical setup ensures accurate data collection for AI-powered personalization while maintaining full control over your theme's structure and avoiding automatic script insertion that could conflict with existing customizations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Following these integration steps helps establish the foundation for improved search performance and conversion tracking. The product view tagging captures customer behavior data that powers personalization algorithms, while the properly configured search results page provides the interface for delivering relevant product recommendations-enabling you to leverage AI-driven merchandising capabilities once the technical integration is complete."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You need to follow this guide to finish setting up Merchandising Cloud in your store."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tag product view"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create search results page"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add script to "}, {"text": "", "code": true}, {"text": " section"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tag product view"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create a new snippet under "}, {"text": "snippets/", "code": true}, {"text": " that is called "}, {"text": "findify-tagging.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": " with the following content"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "HTML"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{% if product %}
{% endif %}{% if cart %}
{% for item in cart.items %}
{% endfor %}
{% if cart.item_count > 0 %}
{% endif %}{% endif %}"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reference this snippet in "}, {"text": "theme.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": " file of the theme by placing the snippet below before "}, {"text": "", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "HTML"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{% include
